classes.reasoning: The document is explicitly titled 'eCRF MODULE: SCREENING VISIT' and contains structured data-capture fields for patient demographics, cancer history, prior treatments, eligibility checklist, and laboratory results. It includes signature/verification blocks ('Entered by', 'Verified by') and patient-level identifiers ('Patient Code: BRC471-___-____'), which are characteristic of Case Report Forms.

indication: Advanced Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC) with activating EGFR mutation, progression on/after first-line osimertinib
summary: This is a Screening Visit eCRF module for study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 (version 2.1), designed to capture baseline patient demographics, cancer history (NSCLC with EGFR mutation), prior treatments (osimertinib), eligibility criteria, and screening laboratory results. The form is used to determine whether patients with advanced NSCLC who have progressed on osimertinib are eligible for enrollment into the trial.
